sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cast(incidentid AS varchar) AS "incidentId" , ticketnumber AS "ticketNo" , statuscode AS "status" , statuscodetext AS "statusName" , dptech_casetopic AS "caseTopic" , new_memo AS "memo" , ownerid_domainname AS "principal" , createdbyname AS "principalName" , accepter_domainname AS "accepter" , new_accepter_idname AS "accepterName" , processor_domainname AS "processor" , new_processor_idname AS "processorName" , dptech_supplyornot AS "supplied" , new_typetext AS "questionType" , dptech_questionleveltext AS "questionLevel" , title AS "title" , new_accepttime AS "acceptTime" , dptech_productmodelname AS "productType" , dptech_plantmodelname AS "productModel" , dptech_processing AS "progress" , dptech_questionreason AS "questionReason" , dptech_resolvesolutionstext AS "solutionType" , dptech_solutions AS "solutions" , new_rma_idname AS "rmaNo" , dptech_accidentlist_id AS "accidentNo" , dptech_casetypetext AS "caseType" , dptech_firstreason AS "reasonFstType" , dptech_secondreason AS "reasonSndType" , dptech_projectnumber AS "projectNo" , dptech_contractno AS "contractNo" , dptech_productsn AS "barcode" , dptech_bulletinno AS "bulletinNo" , dptech_bugorder AS "bugNo" , dptech_productgroupname AS "productLine" , concat('/t/dptech/?mainNavName=xrm##/vform/incident/', incidentId) AS url FROM pms_incident ) t
#projectCode# #contractNo#
contractNo in ( #contractNoList[]# )
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_incident_table_from_itr`(incidentId, ticketNo, status, statusName, caseTopic, memo , principal, principalName, accepter, accepterName, processor, processorName , supplied, questionType, questionLevel, title, acceptTime, productType , productModel, progress, questionReason, solutionType, solutions , rmaNo, accidentNo, caseType, reasonFstType, reasonSndType , projectCode, contractNo, barcode , bulletinNo, bugNo, productLine , url, customInfo ) values
( #list[].incidentId,handler=UUIDToStringHandler#, #list[].ticketNo#, #list[].status#, #list[].statusName#, #list[].caseTopic#, #list[].memo# , #list[].principal#, #list[].principalName#, #list[].accepter#, #list[].accepterName#, #list[].processor#, #list[].processorName# , #list[].supplied#, #list[].questionType#, #list[].questionLevel#, #list[].title#, #list[].acceptTime#, #list[].productType# , #list[].productModel#, #list[].progress#, #list[].questionReason#, #list[].solutionType#, #list[].solutions# , #list[].rmaNo#, #list[].accidentNo,handler=UUIDToStringHandler#, #list[].caseType#, #list[].reasonFstType#, #list[].reasonSndType# , #list[].projectCode#, #list[].contractNo#, #list[].barcode# , #list[].bulletinNo#, #list[].bugNo#, #list[].productLine# , #list[].url#, #list[].customInfo# )
